title: Reference Terracotta Fashion Editorial Portrait AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Terracotta Fashion Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-premium modern fashion editorial portrait for uploaded portrait reference before terracotta luxury editorial transformation, preserving same adult person from the uploaded reference image. Subject: same adult person from the uploaded reference image keeps exact facial identity, age, skin tone, hairstyle, facial hair if present, and natural expression from the uploaded reference while seated confidently in monochromatic burnt orange terracotta luxury suit with slim-fit trousers, structured blazer, crisp cream shirt with open top buttons, and clean off-white premium leather. Scene: Seamless monochromatic warm terracotta-to-rust gradient studio with a sleek chrome-and-black minimalist bar stool and refined high-fashion atmosphere. Composition: Fixed seated fashion portrait: relaxed confident posture, legs naturally apart, one hand on thigh, other hand near the knee, direct eye contact, clean vertical editorial framing, and strong body/stool geometry. Signature Elements: Preserved reference terracotta fashion editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-premium modern fashion editorial photography with luxury magazine polish, minimal monochrome studio design, precise tailoring detail, realistic skin texture, and sophisticated confident mood. Color Palette: Fixed warm burnt orange, terracotta, rust gradient, cream shirt, off-white sneakers, black chrome stool accents, and low-clutter monochromatic harmony. Lighting: Soft premium studio light, controlled facial modeling, subtle suit highlights, gentle floor/background blend, and elegant shadow depth. Materials: monochromatic burnt orange terracotta luxury suit with slim-fit trousers, structured blazer, crisp cream shirt with open top buttons, and clean off-white premium leather should show tailored suit fabric, structured blazer, slim trousers, crisp cream shirt, clean premium leather sneakers, chrome stool reflections, and matte studio surface. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
